startPoint.en: Speak to Irena, the woman crying at the Shantay Pass, south of Al Kharid.
startPoint.es: Habla con Irena, la mujer que llora en Shantay Pass, al sur de Al Kharid.

items.name: Desert shirt
items.display: Desert shirt, desert robe, and desert boots (Black variants will not work. You may purchase from Shantay Pass Shop during the quest.)

items.name: Feather
items.display: 10 feathers (You can only use regular feathers. You may purchase from Shantay Pass Shop during the quest.)

items.name: Bronze bar
items.display: Bronze bar (The bar must be in your inventory.)

items.name: Ring of charos (a)
items.display: At least 200 coins (or 100 with ring of charos (a))

recommended.name: Desert heat
recommended.display: Protection from desert heat, at least 2-3 full waterskins, an enchanted water tiara, or completion of Crocodile Tears

recommended.name: Weapons
recommended.display: Weapons and armour for lower combat level players

recommended.name: Backpack
recommended.display: At least 15 backpack spaces - you will need to remove all worn items and still have room in your backpack for up to 7 quest items

rewards.display: 4,650 experience in your choice of two from the following skills (you may pick the same skill twice): Agility, Fletching, Smithing or Thieving

rewards.name: Wrought iron key
rewards.display: A wrought iron key for access to the Desert Mining Camp and the cave beneath it (can be added to the steel key ring after One Small Favour)

text.en: If you don't have desert clothes, buy them from Shantay.
text.es: Si no tienes ropa del desierto, cómprala a Shantay.

text.en: Begin the quest by talking to Irena (south of Shantay Pass).
text.es: Comienza la misión hablando con Irena (al sur de Shantay Pass).

chatOptions: 1 What's the matter?
1 When did she go into the desert?
3 I'll look for your daughter.
1 Okay Irena, calm down. I'll get your daughter back for you.
Accept

text.en: Run south and slightly west to the gate of the Desert Mining Camp.
text.es: Corre hacia el sur y ligeramente hacia el oeste hasta la puerta del Desert Mining Camp.

text.en: Making sure not to attack him, talk to Mercenary Captain (the one with the all-grey shield).
text.es: Asegurándote de no atacarlo, habla con el Mercenary Captain (el que lleva el escudo completamente gris).

chatOptions: 1 Wow! A real captain!
2 I'd love to work for a tough guy like you!
2 Can't I do something for a strong Captain like you?
2 Sorry Sir, I don't think I can do that.
1 It's a funny captain who can't fight his own battles!

text.en: Kill the Mercenary Captain to obtain a metal key.
text.es: Mata al Mercenary Captain para obtener una metal key.

text.en: The metal key can be added to the steel key ring after One Small Favour.
text.es: La metal key se puede añadir al steel key ring después de One Small Favour.

text.en: Unequip all armour (includes amulets, rings, etc.) and weapons, and keep them unequipped whenever inside the mining camp or mine.
text.es: Quítate toda la armadura (incluidos amuletos, anillos, etc.) y armas, y mantenlas desequipadas siempre que estés dentro del campamento minero o de la mina.

text.en: Open the gate to enter the camp.
text.es: Abre la puerta para entrar en el campamento.

text.en: Go east to the mine door entrance and talk to the male slave on the east of the camp (it's the one who never mines).
text.es: Ve al este hasta la entrada de la puerta de la mina y habla con el esclavo (male slave) al este del campamento (es el que nunca mina).

chatOptions: 1 I've just arrived.
2 Oh yes, that sounds interesting.
1 What's that then?
1 I can try to undo them for you.
1 It's funny you should say that...
1 Yeah, okay, let's give it a go.
1 Yes, I'll trade.

text.en: If a guard catches you unlocking the slave's chains and you end up in the cell, bend the bars on the window and escape. Talk to the slave to try again.
text.es: Si un guardia te sorprende abriendo las cadenas del esclavo y acabas en la celda, dobla los barrotes de la ventana y escapa. Habla con el esclavo para intentarlo de nuevo.

text.en: While wearing the slave outfit, open the mine door entrance. The outfit must be equipped any time you enter the mine.
text.es: Mientras lleves puesto el traje de esclavo, abre la puerta de entrada a la mina. El traje debe estar equipado siempre que entres en la mina.

text.en: Upon entering, head north and follow the cave around until you come to a guarded cave entrance.
text.es: Al entrar, dirígete hacia el norte y sigue la cueva hasta llegar a una entrada de cueva vigilada.

text.en: Making sure not to attack him, talk to one of the guards.
text.es: Asegurándote de no atacarlo, habla con uno de los guardias.

chatOptions: 2 I'd like to mine in a different area.
2 Yes sir, you're quite right sir.
2 Yes sir, we understand each other perfectly.

text.en: Head back to the mine doors and exit.
text.es: Vuelve a las puertas de la mina y sal.

text.en: Unequip your slave clothing and leave the Desert Mining Camp through the gate.
text.es: Quítate la ropa de esclavo y abandona el Desert Mining Camp por la puerta.

text.en: Run west to the Bedabin Camp.
text.es: Corre hacia el oeste hasta el Bedabin Camp.

text.en: Talk to Al Shabim in the southernmost tent to receive the Bedabin key.
text.es: Habla con Al Shabim en la tienda más al sur para recibir la Bedabin key.

chatOptions: 1 I am looking for a pineapple.
1 Yes, I'm interested.

text.en: Run east back to the Desert Mining Camp and climb up the ladder in the white building.
text.es: Corre hacia el este de vuelta al Desert Mining Camp y sube por la escalera del edificio blanco.

text.en: On the western wall search the southernmost bookcase for a book on sailing.
text.es: En la pared oeste, busca en la estantería más al sur un libro sobre navegación.

text.en: Talk to Captain Siad in the same room and ask him if you can chat with him, then mention the sailing book.
text.es: Habla con el Captain Siad en la misma sala y pregúntale si puedes charlar con él, luego menciona el libro de navegación.

chatOptions: 1 I wanted to have a chat?
5 You seem to have a lot of books!
3 So, you're interested in sailing?
1 I could tell by the cut of your jib.

text.en: Open the chest beside the table to get the plans.
text.es: Abre el cofre junto a la mesa para conseguir los planos.

text.en: Go back to the Bedabin Camp and show Al Shabim the plans.
text.es: Vuelve al Bedabin Camp y muéstrale los planos a Al Shabim.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm very interested.
1 Yes, I'm kind of curious.

text.en: Enter the tent to the north.
text.es: Entra en la tienda situada al norte.

text.en: Use the experimental anvil with a bronze bar in your inventory and answer the prompt to create a prototype dart tip.
text.es: Usa el yunque experimental con una barra de bronce en tu inventario y responde a la pregunta para crear una punta de dardo prototipo.

chatOptions: 1 Yes. I'd like to try.

text.en: Use a feather on the dart tip to make a prototype dart.
text.es: Usa una pluma en la punta de dardo para hacer un dardo prototipo.

text.en: Take this back to Al Shabim. He will take the prototype dart, technical plans, and Bedabin key in exchange for a bronze dart and Tenti pineapple.
text.es: Llévaselo de vuelta a Al Shabim. Él tomará el dardo prototipo, los planos técnicos y la Bedabin key a cambio de un bronze dart y una Tenti pineapple.

text.en: Wear the slave outfit, head back down into the mine and give the pineapple to one of the guards.
text.es: Ponte el traje de esclavo, vuelve a bajar a la mina y dale la piña a uno de los guardias.

text.en: Walk through the mine cave and run east to the mine cart.
text.es: Camina por la cueva de la mina y corre hacia el este hasta el vagón minero.

text.en: Choose "Search" option on one of the empty barrels nearby and answer the prompt to take it.
text.es: Elige la opción "Search" en uno de los barriles vacíos cercanos y responde a la pregunta para cogerlo.

chatOptions: 1 Yeah, cool!

text.en: Choose "Search" option on the mine cart to ride it to the other side, answering the prompt to confirm.
text.es: Elige la opción "Search" en el vagón minero para montarte y cruzar al otro lado, confirmando la pregunta.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, of course.

text.en: Failing to enter the cart will cause minor damage. If you fail, attempt to enter the cart again.
text.es: Si fallas al entrar en el vagón, sufrirás un daño menor. Si fallas, intenta entrar en el vagón de nuevo.

text.en: Go down the northwestern passageway containing a large number of slaves at the end and you will find Ana.
text.es: Baja por el pasillo del noroeste, donde hay un gran número de esclavos al final, y encontrarás a Ana.

text.en: Use the barrel in your inventory on Ana to squeeze her inside it, and head back to the mine cart.
text.es: Usa el barril de tu inventario en Ana para meterla dentro, y vuelve al vagón minero.

text.en: Use Ana on the mine cart first, then ride it yourself when it comes back.
text.es: Usa a Ana en el vagón minero primero, y luego súbete tú cuando vuelva.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, of course.

text.en: Search the barrels around the cart and retrieve the one that has Ana in it.
text.es: Busca en los barriles alrededor del vagón y recupera el que tiene a Ana dentro.

text.en: Use the winch bucket north-west of the cart to put the barrel on it.
text.es: Usa el cubo del torno al noroeste del vagón para poner el barril en él.

text.en: Accept the guard's offer for help and give him a compliment.
text.es: Acepta la ayuda del guardia y hazle un cumplido.

chatOptions: 1 Yes please.
1 I said you were very gregarious!

text.en: Head back to the surface and go to the winch bucket in the south-western corner of the camp.
text.es: Vuelve a la superficie y ve al cubo del torno en la esquina suroeste del campamento.

text.en: Do not remove your slave clothes at any point.
text.es: No te quites la ropa de esclavo en ningún momento.

text.en: Operate it and then search the barrel west of it.
text.es: Ponlo en marcha y luego busca en el barril al oeste de él.

text.en: Use Ana on the wooden cart at the centre of the camp.
text.es: Usa a Ana en el carro de madera en el centro del campamento.

text.en: Talk to the Mine cart driver. (Warning: If you use the wrong responses you'll have to rescue Ana again!)
text.es: Habla con el Mine cart driver. (Advertencia: ¡Si usas las respuestas equivocadas tendrás que rescatar a Ana de nuevo!)

chatOptions: 2 Nice cart.
2 One wagon wheel says to the other, 'I'll see you around'.
1 'One good turn deserves another'
3 Fired... no, shot perhaps!
3 In for a penny in for a pound.
3 Well, you see, it's like this...
1 Prison riot in ten minutes, get your cart out of here!
2 You can't leave me here, I'll get killed!

text.en: If you fail, you need to head back into the deepest part of the mine with a barrel and get Ana out again.
text.es: Si fallas, tendrás que volver a la parte más profunda de la mina con un barril y sacar a Ana de nuevo.

text.en: Search the cart and answer the prompt to get on.
text.es: Busca en el carro y responde a la pregunta para subirte.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'll get on.

text.en: Run northeast towards Shantay Pass and talk to Irena.
text.es: Corre hacia el noreste en dirección a Shantay Pass y habla con Irena.

text.en: Congratulations, quest complete!
text.es: ¡Enhorabuena, misión completada!
